hero.label: Technical scaffold
hero.title: Start from the right foundation instead of jumping straight into the landing page.
hero.body: The repo now has a Next.js App Router shell, strict TypeScript, Tailwind foundation, next-intl, an email-based auth session, a Prisma skeleton and domain folders to move into Team -> Match -> Dashboard.

docs.label: Reference Set
docs.title: The docs are ready for domain-based coding
docs.body: Product strategy, schema, Prisma draft and API contracts already live in docs so the next coding phases can stay aligned.

Login.label: Auth
Login.title: Sign in to continue into the football team workflow
Login.body: The current build supports an email-based session and can optionally enable Google OAuth. This replaces the previous auth placeholder with a usable in-app flow.
Login.placeholderBody: Enter an email to sign in, or continue with Google when the provider is configured. If the user does not exist yet, the app will provision a basic profile, user identity, user preference, and session.
